details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page and correctly reported all co-laureates for the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023). For 2024, it listed John Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton; for 2023, it listed Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, and Anne L'Huillier — matching the known facts. The 2025 data was extracted directly from the Wikipedia page. All co-laureates for each year were included.
